text:
EXPLANATION: The cited title is a slightly truncated/mispunctuated version of the well-known working paper "Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality" by Thomas S. Richardson and James M. Robins. The metadata, while slightly modified, refers to this specific real-world academic working paper.

LINK: https://csss.uw.edu/research/working-papers/single-world-intervention-graphs-swigs-unification-counterfactual-and-graphical
FOUND_TITLE: Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality
FOUND_AUTHORS: Thomas S. Richardson, James M. Robins
FOUND_YEAR: 2013
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
